---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change to the template, a new skill, or a sharpening of an existing one
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What you want

(One sentence. Be concrete.)

## Why

(What problem does this solve? Who feels the pain today?)

## How it fits

(Does this sharpen an existing pattern or add a new one? If new, why isn't it better as a user-level customization outside the template?)

## Scope check

Read `CONTRIBUTING.md` — "What 'in scope' looks like." Is your proposal:

- [ ] Role-agnostic (works for any knowledge worker, not just PMs / designers / researchers / etc.)
- [ ] Runs on Claude Code + Git alone (no hosted services, no paid infra)
- [ ] Extends the opinion (doesn't generify into a configurable framework)

If you ticked 3/3, this is probably in scope. If you ticked 0-2, open the issue anyway — I might have missed something, or we might want to rethink the boundary.

## Alternatives considered

(What else did you think about? Why not those?)
